race.comment: NOBLE STYLE (4) is back after an eight-month spell. Raced three times last prep and failed to perform which is out of character. Ran second in a recent jump-out which suggests she is coming along well. Gun fresh performer who can start this prep in the best possible way. VOLKANO (3) has changed stables and is back from an 11-week break. Led but knocked up late when fresh from a spell last prep in a better race than this. Going well on the track for the new yard and he should make his presence felt. MR MARKLE (5) missed the kick before making a powerful late surge to be beaten a neck over 1000m at Mornington recently. Racing well and will be hard to hold out over an extra 200m. NOSIE BY NATURE (6) needed the run last start and is a chance on a seven-day back-up.
